events.title: ICT203 Assignment Due
events.description: Submit your HCI group project wireframes and prototype via the student portal by 11:59 PM.

events.title: Study Group Meetup
events.description: HCI study group session at the campus library, Room 204. Bring your laptops and notes.

events.title: Mid-Semester Exam: Database Systems
events.description: Covers topics from Week 1-6 including SQL, normalization, and ER diagrams. Open book exam.

events.title: Campus Tech Fair
events.description: Annual technology showcase featuring student projects, industry speakers, and networking opportunities.

events.title: Web Dev Workshop
events.description: Hands-on workshop on responsive design and modern CSS techniques. Beginners welcome!

events.title: Group Project Presentation
events.description: Final presentation for ICT203 group project. Each team has 15 minutes to present their prototype.

resources.title: Introduction to Computer Science
resources.description: Comprehensive lecture notes covering algorithms, data structures, and programming fundamentals.

resources.title: Human-Computer Interaction
resources.description: Study guide with key HCI principles, usability heuristics, and interface design patterns.

resources.title: Database Systems - Past Exams
resources.description: Collection of past exam papers from 2020-2024 with model answers and marking criteria.

resources.title: Web Development Fundamentals
resources.description: Complete textbook covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern web frameworks.

resources.title: Statistics & Data Analysis
resources.description: Lecture notes on probability, hypothesis testing, regression analysis, and data visualization.

resources.title: Software Engineering Principles
resources.description: Past exam papers covering SDLC, Agile methodology, testing strategies, and project management.

studyGroups.name: ICT203 - HCI Study Group
studyGroups.description: Weekly study sessions covering usability principles, interface design, and assignment help.

studyGroups.name: Web Development Team
studyGroups.description: Collaborative group for web dev projects. Share code, debug together, and review each other's work.

studyGroups.name: Database Systems Prep
studyGroups.description: Exam preparation group focusing on SQL, normalization, and ER diagrams. Past papers reviewed weekly.

testimonials.name: Ahmad Saugi
testimonials.text: EduConnect made finding study materials so much easier. Everything is organized and accessible in one place!

testimonials.name: Muhammad Alfian
testimonials.text: The collaboration hub is a game-changer. Forming study groups and sharing files has never been this seamless!

testimonials.name: Wahyu Amirulloh
testimonials.text: I love the events timetable feature. It keeps me on track with all my deadlines and campus activities!
